_comment: Committed performance baseline. Regression thresholds per benchmark.
compare_baseline.dart reads this file, diffs it against results.json,
and exits non-zero if any entry is breached.
IMPORTANT: This file is a TEMPLATE — the numeric thresholds below are
placeholders that will produce either 'OK' or harmless warnings until
they are replaced with real per-hardware measurements. To capture the
true baseline on your dev machine:
3. Copy meaningful thresholds into this file's 'benchmarks' map,
using the result meanNs for 'prevMeanNs' and a small margin for
Keys are 'module/name' or 'module/name@variant' — the canonical form

math/cosf._note: Default variant (no isLeaf). Replace maxMeanNs with observed mean × 1.2

math/cosf@isLeaf._note: Should be noticeably faster than @default; capture after first run

math/cardanoAlgorithmForBezier._note: Hottest motion path. Replace with observed mean × 1.2

math/matrixMultiply@aliased._note: Tier 2 candidate: eliminate Float32List(16) scratch allocations

math/matrixMultiply@nonAliased._note: Same optimisation target as aliased variant

motion/curveEval@bezierCardano._note: Worst-case curve evaluation cost — Cardano path

motion/fullMotion._note: Haru idle motion, 600 frames. Primary motion-playback number.

physics/pendulumStress@10rigs_5particles._note: Scaling point; compare ms/frame to haru_8particles

pipeline/fullFrame@60fps._note: HEADLINE METRIC — 60 fps full pipeline. Target ≤ 16.6 ms/frame.

pipeline/multiInstance@4x60fps._note: Homogeneous multi-instance @ 4 copies × 60 fps. Target ≤ 16.6 ms/frame.

pipeline/multiInstance@4x120fps._note: Homogeneous multi-instance @ 4 copies × 120 fps. Target ≤ 8.3 ms/frame.
